flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southern Illinois University-Carbondale fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (75.2% → 66.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Illinois University-Carbondale fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Illinois University-Carbondale rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (45.3% → 62.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Illinois University-Carbondale rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (31.9% → 40.4%).
